item.title: Hugo: An alternative to Jekyll
item.description: I’ve always wanted a space to document the things I learn — somewhere I could easily revisit my notes without digging through random folders and files. Over time, I realised that instead of keeping all this information buried in a notepad, I might as well publish it. It not only gives me a cleaner way to organise what I learn, but also helps others who might be searching for the same thing one day. And that’s how this blog idea began.
